chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Spl. Cr. Appeal No. D – 63 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For hearing of MA No.939/2023 (426 CrPC) 2. For hearing of main case 01.08.2024 M/s Achar Khan Gabol and Ghulam Ali Bozdar, Advocates for Appellant Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional PG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< For the reasons to follow, this appeal is allowed. The impugned judgment dated 19.09.2023 passed by learned Additional Sessions Judge-I / Special Judge for (CNS), Naushahro Feroze in Special Case No.23 of 2023 arising of Crime No.136/2023 of Police Station, Moro is set-aside. The appellant namely, Nabi Bux alias Bijli S/o Jumo Khan Zardari is acquitted of the charge. He shall be released forthwith, if not required in another custody case. Judge Judge ARBROHI
